verses.text: Amah in sumngo biakna tau, a dung pi sawmthum, a vai pi sawmthum, a sang pi sawmlenga a pha khat bawl hi
Tua ciangin amah in a kisung tuikuangpi khat zong bawl hi. Tua pen a bem hi a, a gei khat pan a gei khat dong pi sawmlenga pha-in, pi sagih leh alang sang a, a kimkot pi sawmlilenga a pha hi
Tuikuangpi pualam kimkot pi sawmlinga sungah umgah limte om hi. Tua um gahte gual nihin om a, tuikuangpi a kisun'in kisungkhawm pah hi

Bawngtal sawmlenihte tungah tua tuikuangpi kinga a, thum leilu lam nga a, thum nitumna lam nga-in, thum leitaw lam nga a, thum nisuahna lam nga hi. Tuate tungah a tuikuangpi kinga a, a nunglam uh a sunglamah om hi
A sahna pen khutpeek mai cia ahi hi; a geivial pen unok tawh a kibang hai geivial bangin kibawl a, tua sungah tui tambong tul guk val ta hi

Amah in kisilna ding tuikuang dang sawm zong bawl a, leitaw lamah nga, leilu lamah nga a koih hi. Amaute in meihal biakna-a a zatte uh hihte sungah silsiang ding uh a, tuikuangpi pen siampite' kisilna ding ahi hi
Tua ciangin amah in a kigelhsa bangin kham meivakkhuam sawm bawl a, biakinn sung leitaw lamah nga, leilu lamah nga a koih hi
Amah in sabuai sawm zong bawl a, biakinn sung leitaw lampangah nga, leilu lampangah nga koih hi. Tua ciangin amah in kham kuang za khat bawl hi
Amah in siampite' inntual, leh inntual lian, leh inntual kongkhakte bawl a, a kongkhakte sumngo tawh a zut hi
Tua ciangin amah in inn khang nisuahna lam kiu-ah tuikuangpi koih hi
Huram in beelte, kawbiate, leh kuangte zong bawl hi. Tua ahih ciangin Huram in Kumpi Solomon-a' dingin Pasian' biakinn a bawl nasep a zawhte
Khuampi nihte, kuang-ukte, leh a khuampite lu dawnah a om khuamluzepna nihte, khuampite lu dawnah a om khuamluzepna, kuang-uk nihte a tuam dingin ngen bangin a kibawl nihte
khuampite tungah a om khuamluzepna kuang-uk nihte a tuam dingin ngen banga kibawl khat-a' dingin mang kawlsing gual nih ahi ngen banga kibawl nihte-a' dingin mang kawlsing za lite
tuikuang a kingaknate leh tuate tungah a kikoih tuikuangte
tuikuangpi khat, leh tua nuai-a a om bawngtal sawmlenihte
Topa' biakinn dingin Kumpi Solomon-a' dingin siapa Huram in a kihal sumngo tawh a bawl beelte, kawbiate, sikkeukate, leh hihte-a' dingin nazat khempeuh ahi hi
Jordan zanglei sung Sukkoth leh Zeredah kikal beel lei-ah kumpipa in hihte sungsak hi
Solomon in hih nate tampi tak bawlsak a, sumngo a gikzah kithei zolo hi
Tua ahih ciangin Solomon in Pasian' biakinn sunga na khempeuh a bawl sakte: Kham biakna tau, Ompihna Anlum-a' dingin sabuaite
a kigelhsa bangin biakinn sungnung mai-ah vak dingin kham citak meivakkhuamte leh a meivakte
kham hoih pen tawh a kibawl a pakte, a meivakte, leh a tehte

kham citak tawh a kibawl a taitehte, kuangte, paknamtui-a' dingin pakante, leh vutluahna ahi hi. Siangtho pen mun paina ding kongkhak sungnungte-a' ding leh biakinnpi sung kongkhakte-a' dingin biakinn kongkhak bilte zong kham tawh a kibawl ahi hi.
